description: Upstream job completed with a success status but wrote zero rows (silent failure)

system_identification.note: ADF is the origin of the failure. All downstream tools processed zero rows correctly and are not at fault.

error_classification.note: Silent failure. ADF reported Succeeded with totalRowsExtracted: 0. No error was raised.

correct_answer: POS pharmacy source returned 0 rows for query window 2025-05-16
ADF wrote empty parquet file to ADLS (fileSizeBytes: 1024, rowsWritten: 0)
Databricks ingested 0 rows, completed all transform steps in 5s (baseline: ~267s)
Downstream consumers received empty dataset at morning read
causal_chain_accuracy.note: Causal chain accuracy requires tracing origin to ADF, not to Databricks or Synapse where row count of 0 is also visible.

fix_correctness.correct_answer: Investigate POS pharmacy source system for 2025-05-16 query window. Confirm whether source data exists. If data exists, re-run adf-pharmacy-pos-extract for the affected date window and trigger downstream reprocessing. If source data is absent, escalate to pharmacy POS vendor.
fix_correctness.preventive_fix: Add row count validation step to ADF pipeline that raises a failure status when extracted row count is below threshold. Suggested: 0 rows triggers pipeline failure, not success.

diagnostic_signals.visibility: low — requires knowledge of baseline duration

common_misdiagnoses: Reporting Databricks as the failing system because rowsProcessed: 0 is visible there
Reporting Synapse as the failing system because rowsInserted: 0 is visible there
Reporting no failure because all systems returned status: Succeeded
